steps.name: generate
steps.prompt: Create file .agent/delegation/test-data.json with {"items":["alpha","beta","gamma"],"timestamp":"2026-03-17","status":"generated"}. Then call signal_step_complete with step_name 'generate'.

steps.name: transform
steps.prompt: Read .agent/delegation/test-data.json. Add fields transformed:true and itemCount. Write to .agent/delegation/test-result.json. Call signal_step_complete with step_name 'transform'.

steps.name: verify
steps.prompt: Read .agent/delegation/test-result.json. Verify all fields present. Write report to .agent/delegation/test-report.md. Call signal_step_complete with step_name 'verify'.
